attributes.title: Incident Timeline Investigation
attributes.description: Chronological event correlation view for incident investigation - related log grouping, severity progression, drill-down to raw logs

panels: Event timeline (1-minute buckets, color-coded by severity)
Severity progression bar chart (how severity changed over incident)
Affected hosts list with event counts
Affected users list with event counts
Chronological raw event table with full_log drill-down
filters: Time range (default: last 4h, configurable for incident window)
Correlation chain ID filter (group related events)
investigation_workflow: 1. Set time range to cover the incident window
2. Filter by affected host or user
3. Review severity progression to identify escalation
4. Use correlation chain ID to group related events
5. Drill into raw logs for forensic detail
